description: Import the US macroeconomic data from '/home/ga/Documents/raw_macro.csv' into Gretl. Configure the data as a quarterly time series starting in the first quarter of 1984 (1984:1). Save the resulting dataset to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/us_macro_ts.gdt' and save a time-series plot of the 'gdp' variable to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/gdp_plot.png'.
